CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Continued To Aug-16-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

General Motors LLC's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by May 31, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

General Motors LLC's motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion to strike is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by May 31, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
